description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features large vertical windows, a central double-door entryway, and a covered porch area with potted plants. On one side, there is a spacious open patio with outdoor seating, while the other side has a large, partially enclosed area that could serve as a garage or dining space. The exterior is finished in light, neutral tones, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing simplicity and functionality. The windows are arranged in both vertical strips and single placements, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall structure is boxy and streamlined, typical of contemporary residential architecture.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large vertical windows, and a central entryway, featuring open patios and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with double doors, large vertical windows, a covered porch, and open patio areas on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended flat roof, minimal window openings, and the depth of the open patio and garage/dining area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying multiple windows of varying sizes, the back of the garage/dining area, and the overall boxy structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open patio area, the side of the house with fewer windows, and the layered roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical strips and single windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central double-door entry with steps, flanked by potted plants and a covered porch
